vibe: Gamified, high-energy, competitive, modern tech, dark mode with neon accents

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but generous. p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align mostly, center-align hero sections or empty states.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-6 py-3 hover:bg-primary-hover shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(57,255,20,0.4)] transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-primary/50 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-6 py-3 hover:bg-primary/10 transition-all active:scale-95

cards.glass: bg-[#0a110a]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-primary/20 rounded-xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] overflow-hidden

badges.level: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_var(--tw-shadow-color)]

progress_bar.fill: h-full bg-primary shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(57,255,20,0.8)] rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out

motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale up slightly (scale-105), increase glow intensity, brighten borders.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets and list items.

hero_background.description: Diagonal green binary code lines creating a digital matrix effect. Use with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/80) so it just feels like texture.

avatars.description: Student gamer portraits for leaderboard avatars.

trophy.description: Golden trophies for AIR Legend level or all-time leaderboard winner.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Unbounded', 'Outfit', and 'JetBrains Mono'. Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for XP numbers, ranks, and stats.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with duotone or bold weights to match the chunky tech feel.
Implement the background using a deep `#050805` color. Do not use pure black. Avoid light gray text, use `#A1BBA1` for muted text so it stays in the green color space.
For the Level Badges, use CSS custom properties or dynamic inline styles for the drop-shadow so the glow color changes dynamically based on the level tier.
Always apply a `data-testid` to interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="start-quiz-btn"`, `data-testid="leaderboard-tab-daily"`).
Use a subtle grain texture (`url(/noise.png)` or an SVG filter) over the whole app to give it a gritty, tactical gaming feel rather than a flat digital look.
Cards should NOT have white backgrounds. Use `#0a110a` with a 1px border of `rgba(57, 255, 20, 0.15)`.
